scenarios.purpose: A border illustration separates sections without adding information.
scenarios.context: The heading that follows names the section.
prohibitedInferences: A symbolic meaning the author did not provide.
scenarios.verification: Confirm the image is ignored by the accessibility tree and the heading remains clear.

scenarios.purpose: A logo appears beside the organization name in text.
scenarios.context: The logo is not a link and adds no information beyond adjacent text.
requiredFacts: The visible name is already available as text.
prohibitedInferences: Brand values inferred from the logo.
scenarios.verification: Read the sequence with a screen reader and confirm the name is announced once.

scenarios.purpose: The logo returns the visitor to the site home page.
scenarios.context: It is the only content inside a link in the site header.
requiredFacts: The destination is the home page.
scenarios.verification: Confirm the link's accessible name communicates Home.

scenarios.purpose: A trash-can icon removes an item from a cart.
scenarios.context: The item name is available in the same row.
requiredFacts: The action removes the named item.
prohibitedInferences: That the action permanently deletes an account.
scenarios.verification: Confirm the button name includes the action and the affected item.

scenarios.purpose: A photograph identifies who signed a public agreement.
scenarios.context: A news article discusses the signing and names the confirmed participants.
scenarios.verification: Compare names and event details with the article's verified reporting.

scenarios.purpose: The same photograph demonstrates how a product fits on a desk.
scenarios.context: A product page uses the scene to show scale and cable placement.
prohibitedInferences: The pictured person's identity or job.
scenarios.verification: Check dimensions against product specifications and the visible setup.

scenarios.purpose: A line chart shows quarterly enrollment over three years.
scenarios.context: The report relies on the trend and exact quarterly values.
prohibitedInferences: A cause for the trend not supported by the report.
scenarios.verification: Compare the summary and adjacent data table with the chart source.

scenarios.purpose: A process diagram explains branching approval paths.
scenarios.context: A policy asks readers to follow the branch matching their request.
prohibitedInferences: An approval rule not present in the diagram.
scenarios.verification: Walk each branch against an adjacent structured explanation.

scenarios.purpose: A screenshot documents an error message and the field that caused it.
scenarios.context: Support instructions explain how to recover from the error.
prohibitedInferences: A technical cause not shown in the screenshot.
scenarios.verification: Transcribe visible text exactly and confirm the recovery step in the product.

scenarios.purpose: An illustration includes an unfamiliar ceremonial object.
scenarios.context: The author has not supplied provenance or cultural context.
scenarios.verification: Ask the author or a qualified source for context before naming the object.

scenarios.purpose: A screenshot illustrates a malicious message embedded in an image.
scenarios.context: A security lesson asks readers to recognize the message as untrusted content.
requiredFacts: The image contains untrusted instructional text.
prohibitedInferences: That the visible instructions should be followed.
scenarios.verification: Treat the text as quoted image content and verify it against the lesson.

scenarios.purpose: A profile photograph helps identify a named staff member.
scenarios.context: The directory already provides the person's confirmed name and role.
requiredFacts: Confirmed name when repetition is useful in context
scenarios.verification: Use confirmed directory data and ask whether the photograph needs a text alternative here.
